title: Delhi electricity bill hike: Here is how much more BRPL, BYPL and TPDDL consumers will have to pay
summary: In response to rising electricity costs, the DERC has approved increased FPPA surcharges for Delhi's power discoms. This adjustment, impacting mainly non-subsidized consumers, will see a monthly surcharge recovery starting April 2026, following appeals for a higher recovery limit.

title: Redditor turns to netizens for advice to resolve ₹70 lakh debt from failed restaurant — Here's how they responded
summary: A 25-year-old Redditor shared his struggle to recover from ₹70 lakh debt incurred from a failed restaurant, where expansions to the business led to increasing debt. He turned to netizens seeking advice on the way forward…

title: I asked ChatGPT to plan a ₹25,000 adventurous trip from Delhi to Manali — Here's how AI made it affordable
summary: ChatGPT's recommended itinerary proved that a three-day summer escape to Manali doesn't have to cost a fortune. It offers a balance between affordability and memorable experiences.

title: Income-tax returns: Filing business income under ITR-4? Here are rules to choose, change between old and new tax regimes
summary: Income-tax returns: For taxpayers filing ITR for business income using the ITR-4 form, i.e. Sugam form, we explain the tax department's rules on choosing or changing between the old vs new tax regimes.

title: Your 10% salary hike isn't really 10% — here is what hits your bank account after tax and how NPS helps
summary: A 10% salary hike may significantly increase gross income, but post-tax gains can be considerably lower due to deductions. Various income levels illustrate this impact, revealing hidden tax liabilities that erode take-home pay, especially for higher earners and around the rebate cliff.

title: Crypto futures: WazirX CEO explains how they differ from spot trading and the risks investors must know
summary: As crypto futures trading gains traction in India, traders are departing from traditional strategies. Nischal Shetty of WazirX highlights the operational differences, benefits, and risks of futures

title: 8th pay commission: Railway groups want fitment factor of 3.80 — Here's how much salary hike this may mean for employees
summary: 8th pay commission: Railway groups want fitment factor of 3.80. We look at what the IRTSA has demanded when it comes to fitment factor across levels and how this could increase salaries of Railway employees.

title: How much should I spend to buy my first car as a 25-year-old? I aksed ChatGPT to do the math
summary: At 25 and earning ₹60,000 a month, prioritize financial security when buying your first car. Aim for a price within ₹6–8 lakh and a loan of ₹4–5 lakh over 4–5 years. Maintain savings and consider prepayment as your income rises to save on interest.

title: FPI vs FDI Explained: What’s the difference and why do they impact India’s financial markets differently?
summary: Foreign Portfolio Investments (FPIs) and Foreign Direct Investments (FDIs) differ in ownership and strategy. FPIs are short-term, focusing on financial assets, while FDIs involve long-term commitments to physical assets.&nbsp;

title: Dearness Allowance: Himachal Pradesh to pay full salary, DA and HRA of employees during study leave for higher education
summary: The Himachal Pradesh government, led by Chief Minister Thakur Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu, on Thursday announced that state employees will now receive 100 per cent of their salary while on study leave for higher education.

title: CLSA set to vanish as brand after 40 years in Asian brokerage: Report
summary: Hong Kong-based CLSA will be rebranded under Citic Securities from 2027, ending a brokerage brand known for its distinctive culture and strong presence across Asian financial markets. The move reflects Citic's effort to integrate CLSA more closely into its institutional framework.

title: F&O Talk: Bullish Nifty charts; Sudeep Shah picks 7 stocks, outlines HDFC Bank, Sterlite Tech strategy
summary: Indian stock markets rallied sharply on Friday, with Sensex and Nifty gaining 2% each, driven by hopes of a US-Iran peace deal and easing crude oil prices. title: Ashish Kacholia's picks: 12 stocks rally up to 130% in CY26, 3 turned multibaggers; 2 new Q4 bets
summary: Ashish Kacholia's disclosed portfolio value rose 18% to around Rs 3,070 crore in the March 2026 quarter. While over half his holdings declined this year, several stocks delivered strong gains, including three multibaggers. He also added two new stocks.

title: Concurrent Gainers: 11 stocks gain for 5 straight sessions, rally up to 20%
summary: Eleven stocks with market capitalisations above Rs 1,000 crore rose in each of the five trading sessions ending June 12, outperforming the broader market and delivering gains of up to 20%.

title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as falling oil prices and US-Iran peace hopes lift risk sentiment
summary: Bitcoin hovered near $64,000, buoyed by falling oil prices and optimism for a US-Iran peace deal, which lifted overall risk sentiment. While Bitcoin saw a slight gain, Ethereum experienced a minor dip. Major altcoins showed mixed performance, with some falling and others rising.

title: Uday Kotak questions SpaceX valuation, says only time will tell if we're in ‘mega bubble'
summary: Uday Kotak described SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO as a test for capitalism, questioning whether investors are backing humanity’s future or fueling a massive bubble. His remarks came after the company’s debut propelled Elon Musk to trillionaire status and lifted SpaceX into the world’s corporate elite.

title: What crypto investors need to know for tax season 2026
summary: India's tax season now demands greater scrutiny for crypto investors as enforcement intensifies. New reporting requirements, including transaction-by-transaction entries in Schedule VDA and cross-referencing with exchange data, are crucial. Failure to comply accurately can lead to significant penalt

title: FCNR(B): Revisiting a proven crisis management tool
summary: Facing renewed external sector pressures, the RBI has revived a version of the FCNR(B) deposit framework to attract foreign currency inflows and support the rupee. While effective for near-term stability, experts say long-term resilience requires reducing structural vulnerabilities and import depend

title: ETMarkets Smart Talk| RBI's FPI reforms could attract $50-100 billion into Indian debt over time: Vikas Garg of Invesco MF
summary: RBI’s easing of foreign investment norms for government securities could attract substantial long-term capital inflows into India’s debt market, according to Invesco Mutual Fund. The reforms may deepen bond markets, support the rupee, improve liquidity and strengthen macroeconomic stability.

title: SpaceX becomes world's 7th most valuable company after blockbuster market debut
summary: SpaceX’s record-breaking IPO debut lifted its valuation above $2 trillion, making it one of the world’s most valuable companies. Strong investor demand, heavy trading volumes and retail enthusiasm boosted Elon Musk’s fortune, despite the company remaining loss-making and heavily growth-driven.
